title: psoralea sabulosa
intro: Psoralea sabulosa, also known as sand veronica or sea lavender, is a shrubby perennial plant native to coastal areas of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Psoralea sabulosa include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the body's natural detoxification processes. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
